message:
fix(semantic): auto-strip Xenova/ prefix when using Ollama backend

When embeddingBackend is "ollama" but embeddingModel still has the
default "Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2" value, strip the "Xenova/" prefix
and lowercase the result to produce a valid Ollama model name
("all-minilm-l6-v2"). This prevents a confusing "model not found"
error when switching backends without changing the model name.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
